Flow.description: MQ 2004 - added app intelligance country to the country flow

formulas.name: Convert_Aggregated_Geography_API_to_label
formulas.expression: IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Aggregated_Geography__c}, "AggregatedEMEA"), "Aggregated EMEA, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Aggregated_Geography__c}, "AggregatedMENA"), "Aggregated MENA, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Aggregated_Geography__c}, "AggregatedEurope"), "Aggregated Europe, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Aggregated_Geography__c}, "AggregatedNA"), "Aggregated NA (North America), ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Aggregated_Geography__c}, "AggregatedAPAC"), "Aggregated APAC, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Aggregated_Geography__c}, "AggregatedLATAM"), "Aggregated LATAM, ", null)

formulas.name: Convert_country_iso_to_name
formulas.expression: IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Country_Filter__c}, "CRI"), "Costa Rica, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Country_Filter__c}, "DOM"), "Dominican Republic, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Country_Filter__c}, "ECU"), "Ecuador, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Country_Filter__c}, "SLV"), "El Salvador, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Country_Filter__c}, "GTM"), "Guatemala, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Country_Filter__c}, "HND"), "Honduras, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Country_Filter__c}, "NIC"), "Nicaragua, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Country_Filter__c}, "PAN"), "Panamá, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Country_Filter__c}, "PRI"), "Puerto Rico, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Country_Filter__c}, "LUX"), "Luxembourg, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Country_Filter__c}, "PRY"), "Paraguay, ", null) & IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Country_Filter__c}, "URY"), "Uruguay, ", null)

formulas.name: Dataset_labal_subscription
formulas.expression: IF(INCLUDES( {!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Datasets_contract__c} , "DaaSAccessWebsitesBM"), "Websites, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES( {!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Datasets_contract__c} , "DaaSAccessTechnologiesBM"), "Technologies, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Datasets_contract__c}, "DaaSAccessEcommerceBM"), "Ecommerce, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Datasets_contract__c}, "DaaSAccessAdvertisingBM"), "Advertising, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Datasets_contract__c}, "StockIntelligenceMappingBM"), "Ticker Mapping, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Datasets_contract__c}, "DaaSAccessCompaniesBM"), "Companies, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Datasets_contract__c}, "DaaSAccessAppsPremiumBM"), "Apps Premium, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Datasets_contract__c}, "DaaSAccessAppsBM"), "Apps, ", null)& IF(INCLUDES({!Get_Values_from_Subscription.Datasets_contract__c}, "DaaSAccessSearchBM"), "Search, ", null)

Flow.interviewLabel: Quote product charge plan before save flow {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Quote product charge plan before save flow

recordLookups.name: Get_Flat_fee_Product_Rate_Plan_Charge
recordLookups.label: Get Flat fee Product Rate Plan Charge

recordLookups.name: Get_Product_Rate_Plan_Charge_Tier_Tiers
recordLookups.label: Get Product Rate Plan Charge Tier - Tiers

recordUpdates.name: Copy_1_of_Update_Country_and_Tier
recordUpdates.label: Update Country and Tier longer then 255
